scripts.build: npm run build -w @multi-ai/shared && npm run build -w @multi-ai/browser-runner && npm run build -w @multi-ai/providers && npm run build -w @multi-ai/synthesizer && npm run build -w @multi-ai/orchestrator && tsc -p tsconfig.json && vite build --config electron/renderer/vite.config.ts && node scripts/fix-renderer-paths.mjs
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --config electron/renderer/vite.config.ts" "wait-on tcp:3247 && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron --import tsx electron/main/index.ts"
